message:
🌱 Steer OCP nightly E2E tests to pok-prod cluster (#17)

Add pok-prod label to runs-on in both OCP reusable workflows so nightly
jobs land on the pok-prod cluster which has 96 GPUs instead of being
randomly assigned to a smaller cluster.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -127,7 +127,7 @@ on:
 
 jobs:
   nightly-e2e:
-    runs-on: [self-hosted, openshift]
+    runs-on: [self-hosted, openshift, pok-prod]
     env:
       GUIDE_NAME: ${{ inputs.guide_name }}
       GUIDE_PATH: ${{ inputs.guide_path || format('guides/{0}', inputs.guide_name) }}

@@ -114,7 +114,7 @@ on:
 
 jobs:
   nightly-e2e:
-    runs-on: [self-hosted, openshift]
+    runs-on: [self-hosted, openshift, pok-prod]
     env:
       MODEL_ID: ${{ inputs.model_id }}
       ACCELERATOR_TYPE: ${{ inputs.accelerator_type }}
